description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building enclosed by a perimeter wall, featuring two main rectangular structures with flat roofs. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with minimalistic lines and a clean, geometric design. The property includes a landscaped backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and palm trees, creating a private outdoor living space. The front facade has a central staircase leading to the main entrance, flanked by windows and a garage door. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, and the roof has several skylights or vents. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing open space, privacy, and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, a walled perimeter, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and palm trees. The design is minimalistic with clean lines, large windows, and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, garage door, and two flat-roofed sections within a walled perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge area, and palm trees, as well as the flat roof structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional greenery, and the rear facades of the two main building sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, outdoor seating, and the side walls of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, minimalistic door, and no porch or columns, integrated into the perimeter wall.
